Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: This is a gay hotel Not any problem with that my wife and I have many gay friends which was the reason for our stay there but the hotel claims that it is hetero friendly This is absolutely not the case The staff was very amazingly rude Stay away regardless of your sexuel preferences

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: So the photos on booking com looked great Modern rooms nice pool with pink loungers maybe should have set off alarm bell but did not The only problem was that no where did booking com mention that this was a gay hotel The lobby and rooms are full of images of half naked men and there is even a Please Disturb sign you can hang on the door of you are looking for a bit of surprise man on man action One can even get fed Breakfast in bed or a 4 hands 2 guy male massage if wanted according to the big advert at the lifts Jesus My girlfriend and I did not mind that it was predominantly a hetrofriendly Gay hotel and actually found it hilarious but I can t imagine everyone would be so comfortable The fact that their is a no refunds policy I do think booking com is misleading on this one   Nice Hotel with great rooms

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: I didn t like that I stayed only for 6 days I should have stayed forever P Next time I book a flight to Barcelona this is going to be my hotel   The staff at the reception were really friendly and super charming They helped me through some other problems with deliveries within spain and I was feeling very satisfied with the way I was treated The location is the exact location every one visiting Barcelona needs The room and bathroom were so luxurious

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Breakfast was bad Nothing to eat If you want to stay eat outside There were a few restaurant near   It was good The room was clean the location was good to reach the subway staff were very kind

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Nothing that we remember Our whole stay was perfect   Well the manager and all the front staff were all so accommodating Ricardo marina and another guy in the front desk were friendly and so nice The breakfast buffet was superb and the restaurant staff were nice too The small lady room cleaner made our room and T B clean and nice too All in all our stay was perfect and an experience to remember

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The poolside bar was often unattended when I wanted to get a drink But the staff member was very sweet when he was there   Reception staff were very helpful made for a pleasant stay

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Everything is great When I arrived I received a free upgrade from a room on the ground floor boring to a room on the third floor with a peaceful view of some buildings The bed was enormous king size and the room was very modern clean and stylish I loved the massive shower and personalised A X E L soap shampoo conditioner containers The staff from reception to the people who work in the restaurant to the ladies who clean the rooms were friendly and accommodating It s not super super budget but not extremely expensive either Worth the money in all respects I love the rooftop bar it s a lovely place to relax after a long day particularly if you re visiting Barcelona for a certain festival held in August The breakfast is quite simple but pretty tasty I only ate it once There is a sushi bar and various other restaurants almost right next door to the hotel which I preferred The gay theme is great but saw lots of straight people too Overall so welcoming and wonderful would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The only things I could tell us the pillow where a bit too flat n soft for me but it very personal and subjective however still good Hetero friendly hotel Good but Maybe a bit too much   Really nice place room are nice and cosy with good size The staff is nice rooftop bar n pool are a great place to relax and make friends

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The toilet and the shower without privecy even for a couple it s too much I didnt like the fact that they dont have enough towels at the pool the AC was not good enough   I like the location and the staff are very nice

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: As I was on my own it wasn t a problem but for those who want privacy the bathroom is not closed off from the room The toilet door and walls are frosted glass   The roof pool was one of the best hotel rooftop pools I have ever seen

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Alarm clock was set to 6 in the morning and had very confusing interface to shut it down Nightmare Breakfast is nice but not that great as described in other reviews   Central location normal but not great neighborhood new building really nice rooftoop bar with a pool

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Air condition in the hotel room works bad does not cool down the interior Very small gym for showing off rather excercising as there are three devices there only   Excellent and very helpful reception staff Very clean and well located hotel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Mirrors in lobby were a bit strange Layout of room was like nothing I ve seen elsewhere Wasn t sure if I like it or not   Staff were nice area was good bed was awesome good In General

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: I just think 24 to park the car in the garage is too expensive should be for free   The location is perfect the room was super clean the staff was excellent Every single thing was perfect

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: the air conditioning system was not working properly  the room is very comfortable spacious and well equipped The staff were very nice and helpful plus they offered us a free room upgrade for being regular customers

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Not one thing  Staff were so helpful with fun and interesting things to do in the area The hotel is so modern but classy at the same time The manager Adrian was so helpful and friendly with whatever we needed Couldnt of had a better stay somewhere else

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The staff is either uninformed or everyone there just makes up their own info concerning the hotel Very confusing to deal with a staff contradicting eachother on numerous occasions A bit tourist trappy to hide until checkout that VAT is not included in the so called breakfast promo price that they communicated us at the reception This kind of silly practices are copied from seediest of Benidorm hotels Not comfortable at all to put the mirror next to the wash basin for e g shaving Small rooms with no place to store clothes in a decent way   Quite an original gay concept and at the same time very heterofriendly In fact most of the guests were hetero couples The shower flooded our small room but this was fixed quickly

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: When checked in on July 10 there was a cotton quilt But there s no cotton quilt on July 25 When asked FO he said we should ask in advance if we want Then we made up the bed by ourselves Quite inconvient   1 minute s walk to subway Nice staff

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The receptionist was rude when we tried to check in one hour after check in time He spoke to us as if it wasn t his problem that the room wasn t ready and after offering a free drink didn t follow up with the offer Any receptionist in these circumstances should be apologetic to customers A second receptionist was nice and told us we would be upgraded for no extra charge but the room didn t seem to be much different to the one we had paid for The room was nice and modern but had little to no storage for clothiers   Great location and nice rooftop area with a pool and small gym

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: I booked the highest rate room which suppose to have a bigger french windows that are shown in the photos that they stretch across to the corner of the room indoor veranda what was given to us was the room that is one level lower We complaint later and then they said they made a mistake and that they will offer us breakfast instead to make up for the extra charge and the mistake they did Basically they made a mistake and we had to pay for it by letting us pay for breakfast that we didn t want or need in the first place what they should have done is offer us a free breakfast and refunded us for the extra change of the room type we paid for and never got Other things were with the hotel was super hot no AC in common areas the room was very hot for 3 hours after we have checked in as the AC will only go on after you insert the room key into the room key slot the closet is just a rack and no tea or coffee machine in the room I have noticed this about gay hotels is that they take pink dollar for granted and offer the minimal as premium while you can get these things in a 3 star hotel that is not gay The only thing about this hotel is that it s gay theme look and people who go there and that s it nothing special about it at all The pool and gym are very tiny that is silly to call them facilities sorry   The overall atmosphere was fine

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Reception made me wait for my room by 1 hour The reason was housekeeping didn t prepare the room which was not acceptable The reception and staff had attitude The towels and robes were not new misrepresent the room sizes online Value for money is severely lacking While we waited all luggages were in the bar area

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: We arrived at 1 00 but couldn t check in until 3 00 but they did look after our bags There s a bar on the roof terrace not always open but no lounge bar not that i found anyway   Small gym but has good quality equipment for once in a hotel Nice rooftop terrace with pool and sunbeds Good breakfast selection Rest of hotel is typical of chains in that mid range not budget but equally not top end I d guess about 40 guests gay and 60 straight

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The buffet was great but the eggs had dried out and turned green The hotel is a hike to the center of the Eixample district   Every staff person from the desk to restaurant to the cleaning staff was energetic friendly and professional The rooms were trendy and nice but offered no privacy for friends traveling together

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: An excellent hotel for acceptable price Friendly staff Excellent stylish room Nice breakfast every morning Close to the Subway and close to a bus to the airport Everything was great

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Booking com could have done a bit more to explain that this hotel is aimed principally at homosexual guests The photos in the lobby were a bit too much for a straight couple   Clean and friendly staff with good facilities Breakfast was first rate and the area is authentic and unspoilt by tourists

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Good location very nice and helpful staff everything was fine However breakfast could be better nothing special for this price tea and coffee really poor

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: We had higher expectations for the rooms as they looked great in the pictures online but when arriving the room felt quite empty and not as opulent as what we would have expected from a 4 hotel Also certain amenities such as complimentary water and coffee in the room was not offered by the hotel We also asked for an iron and board and the unit that was supplied spewed water all over the place yes this is replaceable but in a 4 establishment these should have been checked guests shouldn t have to request another one It s the small details like this that will put us off staying at the hotel again   The hotel is great and we enjoyed staying there as the location was perfect to get around the city via the metro The front desk and bar staff were very friendly and helpful when ever we needed anything The pool area and bar a definite win for the hotel guests

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: no tissues in the room and no central lighting switch  sleep quality extremely quiet the bed was comfortable and the bed sheets were so soft and light that you would not want to get out of bed the staff were very friendly and extremely helpful making you really welcomed the location is perfect quiet area street but 1 minute to the rocafort metro station which is 2 3 stops from city centre and also the aerobus 6 euros stops around 200 meters from the hotel wifi was excellent

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Be aware that house keeping is until 17h 5pm you may want to request an earlier room cleaning   Comfortable beds Very nice and accomodating staff thank you Marisol and Daniel Stylish modern decor and lovely pool area Relaxed ambiance

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Straight couples and kids are taking over this hotel Should at least be adults only policy   Rooftoop with sundeck pool and bar Excellent wifi Nice design Glutenfree options breakfast Fantastic staff

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: I didn t use any thing in mini bar but charged mini bar after I left I sent them message and they refund it So everything is OK But that made me surprised   It was great hotel I really love this hotel Location is bit far from the center but still possible to walk The interior was so nice it made me so happy Breakfast restaurant was so fancy I love overall about this hotel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: I would recommend that hotel for all of the people It is very comfy modest and nice We ve got upgrade to premium room for free The location is really good just 2 min to metro station Staff is very helpful and friendly Design is perfect I fell in love with it Great swimming pool and bar on the rooftop Are you going to Barcelona Choose Two hotel Barcelona by Axel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: I was only staying one night and had wanted to take advantage of the roof terrace but they closed it for three hours which wasn t great Other than that had a good stay   The staff at reception were nice and the location is good quiet but still in walking distance of everything The design of the room is great and I had everything I needed I d stay again

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The staff was amazing and extremely helpful Adrian and the girl with long brown hair Thank you for everything And the one who helped me when my wallet was stolen Amazing room all amenities perfectly clean Huge bed

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Breakfast room quite dark and the choice is not so good for the requested price The barman is not very good on doing cocktail and he took quite a long time to receive 3 glass he didnt had any suggestions to our requirement or demand   The Staff is very very friendly and they try to solve in the best way any costumer request The roof top with the swimming pool and the sky bar is very peaceful and nice The good quality of the bed the cleanliness is perfect nothing to say on that The unique concept of Heterofriendly is respected at 100

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: No possibility of shade on the roofdeck   Thoughtful layout and d cor well built rooms that are comfortable very clean and soundproof double headed showers nice pool roofdeck skybar professional kind staff great value for cost

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Slow laundry service poor internet connection no clock in the room no toilette brush in the room  This was my I think 4th visit this year and hell I am coming back

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Although marketed as Hetero friendly as a gay man you sometimes feel that straight couples are trying to take over our places   Friendly Gay hotel great location very comfortable and stylish

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: leaving   Light airy room really comfortable bed The staff couldn t have been more friendly or helpful Breakfast was great plenty of choice and lovely fresh food

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Nothing  pool and bar area on roof reception staff very fast and courteous location great 50m from metro good restaurants closeby courtesy foot massage on arrival

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The roof top pool is great The location is super convenient as it s just 50 step away from the metro station Staff are friendly and help I hope I will be there again

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Would have preferred the pool a couple of degrees cooler as it s VERY warm and the roof could do with some loos which may come once the bar opens in the summer   Staff here are fantastic For hotel loved the roof top pool sunsets laid back guests Lots of English speaking TV options a great buffet breakfast with lovely scrambled eggs bacon as well as fresh fruit pastries As a sole female traveller I chose TWO as its gay hetero friendly I wanted a hotel where I could use the facilities freely without the burden of man hassle Location an easy walk to La Ramblas though a longer hike to the beach I was happy with that as there s so much to see

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Nothing that I can think of   The customer service of the hotel staff The cleanliness and the responsiveness Adrian Dominguez was brilliant right from my check in to check out he was very helpful also helped me a lot understand the city routes better and places of attraction

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Well the sexual tendencies is a personal matter but making it the hotel identity that is too much This matter makes it a not a recommended choice for me as a straight human being they could ve been just hetero friendly like the rest of the hotels in the city but not bragging of it like this the way made me feel a stranger being there  overall it is one of the best hotels in it s class very well decorated extremely neat and clean I loved it

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Very wide pillows are awkward to sleep on Could have a bar at the roof top pool area   Roof top pool was lovely rooms was nice and spacious comfy bed great breakfast excellent customer service

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: One of our shopping bags just disappeared from the room with 150 Euro clothes in it It took 4 hours for the personnel to tell us that they don t know anything about it so we had to go to a Police station and write an official complaint Poor room service on in the evenings Poor facilities a rooftop pool is basically a mid size jacuzzi   Rooms are relatively quiet and cosy Reception personnel is friendly Clean

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: I didn t like the free shampoo I know it s free but it s a really bad one   The staff was really nice and helpful Breakfasts are great at this place don t miss jamon and salmon The area is quite posh and lovely the hotel is situated super close to the tube station and airport shuttle bus stop

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: If the sky bar available in the rooftop would be better and maybe the hotel can organize a daily party would be good for the in house guests coz this is a theme hotel how about Gym   Good location and nice staff thanks receptionist Ricardo and Breakfast staff Andrie for the nice service the room is so tidy and also big i like this hotel so much the wifi also very fast breakfast is ok

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Overall very pleasant experience however apart from Ricardo who was very helpful and approachable the rest of the reception staff could come across a little bit short Very mean glasses of champagne as well whenever I have ordered one they only pored half lol The Sky bar wasn t finished but the website did not mention that prior so I was quite disappointed that every time I wanted a drink I had to go down to reception where receptionists said that they are not bartenders although they stand behind the bar lol

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Nice Hotel in a nice neighborhood close to all that is happening Rooms were small even after a upgrade but with a nice shower and comfy bed Rooftop bar was not open yet so not as vibrant as the main Axel Hotel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: My holiday was ruined when I caught my car on the wall when trying to get out of the parking Large cars cannot get round the bends in one go Guests should be told the parking is not suitable for large cars Both reception staff said it is very difficult to park a large car but did not offer to help It has become a very expensive stay It also cost 24 euros per night I also felt uncomfortable with the type of hotel this is It would help to warn potential guests   Modern and clean

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: more hangers and a shelf for the clothes would be practical  friendly staff perfect location next to metro station Rocafort and close to the airport bus stop yet it is quiet at night Also the neighbourhood is lovely unique modern design of the hotel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: No iron in the room the cleaning services glass walls in the room  The pool friendly and helpful staff design of the hotel very well located hetero friendly

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Lovely open rooms which means that the toilet is separated only with a milky glass door from the rest of the room Let s say it s not sound proof Not a big deal if you go there with your loved one   It s a great place to stay for a couple of nights When we were there it was about 50 hetero and 50 gay couples which made a relaxed group of people The hotel is pretty new and very comfortable It s right by a metro station Breakfast buffet was small but really great quality

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The transparent door of the shower should be possible to dim Some things should stay private   Great facilities well organized room clean location is perfect right next to the subway station close to gyms restaurants sights Wifi is fast

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: That I could stay longer   Wonderful hotel in great location near Metro Room was clean spacious and very comfortable Staff was very good especially Adrien at the Front Desk Would strongly recommend this hotel and hope to visit again

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: I could have used more enclosed spaces to deposit clothes and other things The cooked food from breakfast scrambled eggs sausages were not great for my taste but there were plenty other things to choose from   Nice hetero friendly hotel Really close to the metro station close to Montjuic Castle clean and friendly staff

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Room noise was better than most Spanish hotels we stayed at but could still hear neighboring plumbing and corridor noise   My girlfriend and I loved this hotel and had an excellent stay Very helpful front desk staff A particular thank you to Daniel who provided us excellent advice on local eating options including an entire street of tapas as well as what would be one of our favourite restaurants of the trip Mono less than a block down the road Staff were also helpful printing tickets to local attractions and car hire that we had booked online Room was large stylish open and clean Matched the online pictures wonderfully Good temperature control in room plenty of powerpoints to charge modern devices Bathroom large spacious Lovely shower Rooftop pool is heated for those after a quick dip outside the summer months Note that the location is near two different subway lines as well as one of only three stops the A1 and A2 airport express buses make on the way to the airport Walking distance from old town as well

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: We were expecting more for that price We got a superior deluxe room and IT DIDN T EVEN HAVE A COFFE MACHINE or just a cattle to boil water maybe only in our room we didn t find out Actually I wonder what besides the price was the difference between normal room and this superior deluxe one Quality of furniture wasn t the best some drawers was not working properly And WiFi code works only for 3 devices which was hard to deal with cause we had 2 phones and 2 iPads   Hotel is located in nice area not that far from city centre Personel was really nice and helpful Room was very clean and nice designed

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: There is really nothing to complain about May be just that for somebody not speaking Spanish it is difficult to find an interesting TV channel to watch A TV guide with a list of channels would be a big help I didn t see any in the room Otherwise you have to click channel by channel to find out what s available   Very good location Just a few minutes walking distance from Placa Espana Very close to the bus stop to the airport and other means of transport Not a big variety of food for breakfast but fresh tasty and enough to have a good meal and not to be hungry till lunch Nice and helpful staff Place was clean quiet and I liked the design and equipment of our room The pool on the roof seemed to be a nice place to have a rest after sightseeing tours but at the time we were there it was a little too cold outside for my wife to use it although the water is heated We spent mostly late evenings and nights in the hotel but it was quite a pleasant stay Good ratio value for money

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Not very close from downtown you have to take the metro   The staff was extremely friendly all of them the room was clean the break fast was okay and the hotel location was very close to metro station

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: tariff doesn t include all charges so at check out you pay extra all this is in the very fine print on booking com the room is modern but lacks case space if more than one poor pillows and net type curtain on the window for privacyGood location  location is very good but things are spread out we used hop on hop off buss staff very helpful Breakfast excellent good range and plentiful

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: if we could have stayed a week lol   Reception smiling helpful relaxed and a feeling like home Facilities all modern well thought of breakfast healthy et copies so so clean and fun we will be back and will recommend to family and friends

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Location I know Barcelona Don t realllly get the location but I gotta trust the axel group   Stayed at axel Barcelona lots of times this one is better staff are muchhhhhh nicer and hotel has a cooler ore chilled feel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The bed was a bit too hard you could feel suspensions in the bed No restaurant serving in the evnings   Room was really nice designed and clean Fairly good location close to city center ony 10 15 min walk to las ramblas street

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Everything was great   Location was excellent Staff was amazing and service was personalized and very friendly Rooms were very comfortable with a modern decoration I will totally recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The bathroom area is a tad cramped but that is only a mild complaint   The receptionists were among the most helpful and friendly we have ever come across The location was ideal next to the airport bus and a metro station The entire hotel was clean and as a straight couple we can confidently say there is no need to worry for wont of a better word about it being a hetero friendly hotel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Rooms with bad soundreducing architecture I ordered month ago and asked for a quiet room as I was there for buisness Well I was granted a room on second floor to the street I didnt sleep at all that night because of noise from both street and corridor I rushed out early in the morning for my meeting and when I came back at 2pm I asked politely for another room I was met with no understanding and a lecture about that I had to do my wish before 12 When I got up to my room it hadn t been cleaned yet Definitely not going back

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Rooms are modern but lack basic furniture NOWHERE to place clothes on other than a hanging rack with 8 hangers No drawers or area to put clothes away Breakfast basic Not impressed at all   Great location

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: More drawers for the clothes would be nice   Great new gay hotel Room was comfortable according to the somewhat naughty design of Axel Hotels Staff was very friendly and helpful Good location

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Lack of privacy the glass door on the bathroom and the shower and the abundance of mirrors meant revealing more than I might ve liked   Breakfast was delicious served pasties cava smoked salmon fruits Bed was comfortable Pool was nicely heated Great to be so close to the metro

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: The matress was old or well used should be replaced Garage is for medium cars for big ones is really difficult to enter or exit   The room was big enough fast check in and check out

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: If we are to be picky they didn t have a hairdryer or iron in the room   The staff and the cleanliness of the hotel were exceptional If we had questions they were happy to help us

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Be aware the bathroom was not as private as some might like   Great location Easy access to the popular tourist spots either by walking or by metro with station just around the corner Really friendly and helpful staff The room was modern clean and quiet We had a really enjoyable stay

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Nada   Comfort Good choice of TV channels Great soundproofing room at rear of building At booking time we had not realised the lifestyle orientation of the hotel However we felt perfectly welcome and at home although not belonging to the gay community Will definitely go again if fortunate enough to visit Barcelona

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Our room had a problem with the electricity and for some hours we didn t had tv air conditioned internet etc and because the room was on the corner was a bit cold Could be nice from the hotel to give us something a glass of wine or for the problem that we had and for the fact that we were nice   The breakfast was good but no vegetables at all only garlic The staff is ok and very polite The roof and the swimming pool are ok nice place for a wine and for smokers If you want to visit the city near is the bus H12 that is going to the Paseo de Gracia and Pl Catalunia From hotel to Rambla by feet is only 30 min nice walk and visit Barcelona

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Very Good location Only 30 seconds near Metro Nice service and very fabulous facilities High CP rate I will definitely choose TWO Hotel again if I travel to Barcelona next time

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: great stylish hotel Excellent position close to the metro station Friendly and funny staff lovely rooms Excellent price for the services offered

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: just a small detail It would be perfect if in the room there was a second curtain thiner than the current one for letting pass the light while having some privacy as the actual one stops all the light and you cannot see through it   It was a pitty to only stay one night I will definitely come back We had a room upgrade for free I loved the design of the room perfect for couples not ideal for friends The room was on the back side of the building facing a park calm and with plenty of light 20seconds walking distance to the metro stop of Rocafort This metro lines brings you to the heart of Barcelona within 10min What we enjoyed the most was the rooftop swimming pool which was heated Perfect after a day visiting Barcelona

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: the room upgrade is completely the same room as the normal room I ve booked normal room but it was too loud traffic so i had to pay 10 Euros more per night and i got an upgrade same room but the other side  nice staff big bed near to the metro station

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Can t think of anything   The bed was firm and really comfy The hotel was immaculately clean and was just literally 30 seconds walk from Rocafort metro station Heated pool on the roof was fantastic for those cold February evenings

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Everything   Nothing The location is awful The rooms are very small The staff was not courteous at all There are no perks to choosing this over any other hotel

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only

Full_Review: This hotel has definitely worst and the most tricky staff ever I booked a superior room they gave me a double the one above was deluxe When I realised the situation they insist lying and told me the room i ve been given is a superior room until I wanted to see a double and a deluxe room to compare They chanced my room after a long discussion and offer me 100 euros refund I accepted it When I check out I realised they hidden the 100 Euros refunded amount to my extras When I asked what is it they told me it was Tax I realised they were lying again Didn t pay that amount Be careful if you stay there

Hotel_Name: TWO Hotel Barcelona by Axel 4 Sup Adults Only
Full_Review: Checking in was really complicated My stay here was a present from someone else and they booked and prepaid using their credit card But when I tried to check in myself the staff told me they needed to see the credit card used to make the booking or they wouldn t let me check in Of course I did not have the card So I had to contact my friend and he had to send them photos of the card Didn t matter that the booking was already paid for and it had my name on it This means in this hotel you can only book a room for yourself You cannot book for anyone else because then it will be too difficult when they try to check in Also after I checked in when they gave me the key it was for a room that already belonged to someone else Someone else was already using that room I went in and all their suitcases and things were in there and the room smelled of cigarettes I had to go back to reception and tell them and then they gave me another room that wasn t already being used I know this is a new hotel but still stuff like this shouldn t happen In this hotel the restaurant only does breakfast The advertising you can see everywhere like in your room and the lift etc They say how amazing it is But actually it s not Especially because the food is not fresh I ate some fruit there for example some watermelon and it was already sour like it was a few days old already I told the staff and they just brought it back to kitchen didn t explain or apologise or anything I felt this was unprofessional   Good location If you want to do something in the city centre or the old town it s a perfect choice Staff were very friendly

Full_Review: Far from the city   Restaurant was cozy Staffs were very friendly and helpful Very close to the airport Has airport shuttle Not far from Metro station Bus stop is just next to it Perfect for those who are using the airport and staying for a short period

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The guest are very noisy the room have no sound proof Some guest talk so loud outside the building while we stay at 2nd fl   Comfy bed near airport free shuttle bus

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Restaurant was extremely ordinary so have tapas in the city before returning to the hotel Pool was inside and gym was 1 machine next to indoor pool  Perfect location if you need to fly out early next day like us bonus free airport shuttle Staff were excellent we even had a coffee made for us at 5am

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: It was definitely design by a man Lightning was poor especially for women who want to apply makeup even just a little eyebrows pencil   It had free airport shuttle

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I didn t like the fact that when I jumped in the shower there was no body gel shampoo As I emailed and called that I was doing an early checked in I had to call reception twice for it to arrive The window was shut but I killed 3 mosquitoes during my stay   I really really liked the bathroom the design was marbellous The bed was quiet comfortable I found a walking distance market where to eat good and relatively cheap

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Breakfast did not have enough hot food Location appears to be industrial area   Nice Property in close proximity to the Airport The Hotel provides complimentary shuttle service to and from the Airport which is a great convenience for travelllers on short stay business travel Staff was helpful Rooms were spacious and well equipped On site Parking was great too

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The room was next to a main road the traffic noise was ridiculous trying to sleep No instructions on how to use air con To use the safe you had to get a key at reception that should of been given as an option checking in not just a note on the safe itself  Layout of the room Beds very comfy

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No atmosphere we were bored Needed to give two year old dinner at 6pm was told couldnt get anything hot until 8pm Which resulted in us walking around looking somewhere for him to get suitable meal in an industrial area with very few facilities   The rooms were excellent Staff very helpful and friendly Easy transfer to airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Enjoyed my stay here I typically stay here when I arrive in Barcelona before driving off for Andorra Close to airport and easy access to highway without dealing with traffic headaches Staff speak english and parking is super easy not a small underground garage

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Locario Ia really bad 11km to airport area is terrible full of trucks they charged for the parking ans didnt advert me that I had to pay  Staff is really nice

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: There was a flashing light in the bathroom that would not turned off The light went through the glass door of batgroom and was reflected on a large mirror As a result I did not sleep til morning

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The shower was broken No cold water only mild or hot Had no time to ask for fixing or change a room as we were very tired The hotel is 20 min at night 30 min at day by bus from city center Av Para lel up to 45 min if traffic jams are on the main road to Barcelona The area is industrial so nowhere to go It is only suitable if you need a short stay near Barcelona airport or port It is a business purposed I do not suggest it for leisure stay Taxi price still high because minimum charge to airport still 20 EUR   We needed a hotel nearby airport for only 2 days The hotel is old but somehow refurbished The price suited us but it was lower comparing to others only because this hotel is far away from city Prices in restaurant were high enough but breakfast selection was very good Staff is friendly Everything was clean

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Food options were limited for snacks as well dinner Not a lot of other option close by   Location for my purposes was good close to the airport with free shuttle service Also close to a a metro station to go into the city

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The staff in the restaurant were very inattentive At breakfast every table was dirty and no staff in sight Had to sit at a dirty table with one unused place setting and they still had the gall to charge me for breakfast   The room was clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Approaching the hotel from south of Barcelona we found it exceeding difficult to find The address was not very helpful to someone who doesn t know the area What exactly is Mercabarna A street an area an establishment we had no on line access since we were traveling with American cell phones so no way to search

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No one told me at reception that I needed to plug in my room key to activate the electricity and A C in the room One of the male staffers had a bit of a negative attitude and made me nervous about my bags possibly being lost on my flight home Everything arrived home okay   After three weeks of travelling and staying in Air BnBs with friends and in budget hotels it was really nice to check in at this Best Western Europeans do hotels right This is not like a Best Western in the US and in a good way I rented a bike and rode around the nearby nature reserve There was also a great caffe bar near the river where I stopped and had an Aquarius and delicious torta tomato bread and articoke croquettas made with locally grown El Prat articokes After my bike ride I went for a swim in the saltwater pool Good day The free shuttle took me to the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The location is very bad industrial area The rooms are small and do not look like what is advertised on the internet The beds were like hospital beds and although I sent my requirements to the hotel well in advance the room was not very nice and I had to request a change of room which could only be done the next day The only person that assisted was David at reception but certainly not a very nice hotel for the rates that they requested Towels had holes in it and were thread bare bathroom was not neat and clean advise all to avoid this hotel at all costs

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: If this hotel wasn t where it was and have the weekend transportation issues as during the week it is hopping with huge trucks going about their business it would be an excellent hotel The hotel is in the industrial commons next to a frozen food packing company and some other factory packing plant businesses The surroundings were just very industrial not exactly picturesque There were nice mountain biking paths by the river if you had the gear for that sort of thing it may have been nice The area of the city is deserted on the weekend Going to the newly built metro and being the only person there was a little unsettling especially since the metro came less frequently to boot Then a regional train was needed to get into the city center It was 3 ticks on my multipass metro ticket each way and it was about an hour s journey I took the bus into the city the next day It only comes every half an hour on weekends so look up the time beforehand It takes only about a half an hour to get to the port then a 5 minute walk to the para lel metro stop Not bad but on the way back to the hotel the driver was giving another group of drivers who had just gotten off work a ride to their cars which I assume were parked at the end stop of the line The driver didn t stop at the stop for the hotel and drove over the river to the next stop I had to walk back over the river to th hotel navigating an industrial round about and figuring out which side of the bridge was open to pedestrian traffic Since there was no shade on the route I was a melting puddle of perspiration upon returning to the hotel If they warned about these transportation issues beforehand and maybe gave a business card to give to the bus driver for the return journey I think that I would not have been so peeved I told the lady at the counter what had happened and she said it had happened to her before too because the drivers get to talking and don t pay attention   The staff was great The hotel had great amenities like a market to buy snacks a bar with bar food and a proper restaurant There was also a pool and sauna but I didn t use those facilities Breakfast buffet was delicious Bus stop right outside hotel metro 10 minute walk There is a free shuttle to the airport and they let me keep my luggage there during the day of my checkout

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: There are only warehouses around and nothing more but then it is an airport hotel and only expect guests in transit   Very warm and friendly staff Helpful and efficient Kudos to the young lady at the reception on the night of 13 14 06 2017 who single handedly managed to restore the power supply to no less than 15 rooms on the 3rd floor after a major fault in the hotel s electrical system and handled all the guests so pleasantly that none complained for nearly an hour that they had to go without light or air conditioning Their airport shuttle is punctual The bar and cafe remain open till 1 30 am to accommodate the last people in The bus stand is 2 minutes from the gate of the hotel and the metro about 10 minutes walk

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The location and staff were horrible The hotel was hard to find and in an industrial area no restaurants shops etc The staff basically the reservations person Esther was rude and downright insulting I ended up paying 264 for a 107 room because I made an error in my reservation which I attempted unsuccessfully to correct 30 minutes later Definitely not recommended   The location was somewhat close to the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Can t think of anything that I didn t like  I was due to take a flight to Olbia from Nice and it was cancelled and I was re routed via Barcelona and needed a hotel close to the airport as the flight landed late and the following flight was early the next morning so just needed a bed This hotel fitted the bill perfectly free airport shuttle clean room comfy bed kettle in the room for that early cup of tea and good wifi

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The staff and service was horrible I arrived with a group of people There was no one at the front desk to check us into the hotel for 45 minutes By the time an employee arrived at the front desk the lobby was full of people waiting It was horrible

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We just missed shuttle and had to wait 45 minutes hoping another was coming it did They need s call system   Hotel has aged it is strictly for overnight waiting for plane next morning The staff are very good and cancellled out negatives Slept well there 15 minute shuttle and we were back at airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The room was smaller than I prefer but it was just for a night The food was just adequate   The shuttle to the airport was very convenient The property is clean and efficient The staff was helpful and kind Everything was easy

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel should give a location map for the place where the shuttle picks up Just mentioning Parking G does not help Most people are unaware of its exact location

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We stayed here due to it s location to the airport as we had an early flight to catch Everything was fine staff were very polite and helpful Rooms were great very clean with great facilities Would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: It took 1 2h to find where the parking G where the shuttle was supposed to wait when I arrived at 1 am There is no signage at the airport to direct you to that parking lot Because no one answered my request on Booking com to give me more details then no one was there when we arrived and we had to wait another 15 min before the staff organised for a shuttle to pick us up This booking was

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The only issue that I might have is that the hotel is situated quite a distance away from the main city centre of Barcelona However the public transport to and from the hotel is easily accessible The bus stop is literally just 30 metres or so from the hotel and a short walk of about 650m takes you to the metro subway station which connects to the main subway network The hotel staff at the main desk are ever willing to assist guests should you have any questions on the timings of the buses   The staff are very helpful and courteous The airport shuttle bus was clean punctual and very convenient No need to fuss about taxis etc Wi fi was fast and reliable Food served at the hotel cafe on the ground floor was reasonably priced and tasty There is a small convenience store just behind the main counter which makes it convenient to get your basic necessities and bites Overall I would say that my stay at the hotel was very pleasant and fuss free

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No electricity in my room when check in Room too hot and AC was not working first then it worked but on request at the entrance desk no possibility to set it up from the room   Good location close to the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel is not near any other hotels or restaurants but it s next to a great walking biking jogging path along the canal very clean and safe area although commercial

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: There was nothing to dislike on this   The staff were so helpful and friendly although it was not close to town there was bus and train options to get there which did not take long Be careful with your wallets on the train i was robbed while trying to manage our luggage

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: we didn t like the food very much but we are used to eating differently   the hotel was fine we were surprised by the location being so far from the city but there was bus service very close so we were able to go into the city

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel sauna was very small swewmming pool tiny too fitness there was only one runing machine The amount money I paid it was far too much for there service

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel is about 700m far from closest metro station and you have to walk in factories area  Confort calm clean room Staff was very helpful specially Alijandra Nice resturant

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Booking confusion originally double booked then both cancelled Then booked best western Then told one of original bookings at Original hotel was not cancelled And I had to stay there or loose Money for four days Instead I had loose one days money Through no fault of my own Booking dot com very helpfull But I still lost 167 euros one Night Stay at best western   Beds very comfortable breakfast choice very good

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: It would of been nice to have more tv channels available in English And it would of been great if the shuttle could of picked us up at the cruise port   I liked that the front desk or concierge person spoke English He was very helpful I also appreciated the free shuttle to the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Probably a slightly bigger room   The staff accomodated our special requests very well On the day we booked out we left our lugguage there and upon return to the hotel after sight seeing the whole day allowed us to shower and change in a spare room in preparation of our flight back to our country We really appreciated this because our return flight had a connection which meant we spent 15 hours flying and would not have had a chance te refresh during the return flight

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The fact that Booking com s rate was 20 less on the day of arrival than what I had prepaid non refundable 2 weeks prior   Good quality airport hotel Great knowledgeable staff good breakfast fine casual dinner that we were able to get at American times before 8pm nice grounds Really appreciated the good quality of the linens and towel after 2 months of rental property linens

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Pool and sauna need updating   Nice clean hotel Fantastic staff very friendly and helpful Excellent food Added bonus of a FREE bus shuttle to and from the hotel Good location about 20 mins from city center but we didn t mind rambling the bus journey

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The location is a bit far away from the metro station you need to walk for 10 min They said they have shuttle in the airport to pickup us but we could not find the shuttle They said you should have called us from the airport but as you know not all phones work in Spain when you go there from another country   However they provided us the shuttle from hotel to airport The pool was very small but not a big deal The staffs were very polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We arrived at 9 in the night and had to wait half an hour until our room was ready which then was stinking from cleaning stuff and not very clean   The shuttle worked smoothly

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Although in the middle of an Industrial area it was the nearest to the airport and had its own shuttle bus With an early flight out it was better than fighting the traffic to get out of Barcelona

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The shuttle to the Airport left us at arrivals because some passenger asked to and the driver never thought that the rest of the passengers needed to get off at departures Short story needed to walk like 2 kms to get to Departures   Everyone was very nice and friendly really liked the hotel Will surely be back

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Shuttle service was poor Shuttle didn t pick up on time There were almost 20 people and just came with 13 seats mini bus Security locker was small I couldn t store my MacB Air in the locker  Nice staff Breakfast simple but delicious Clean

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We just stayed for one night there is nothing to complaint or dislike If you need markets cafeterias or shops around is a problem   The staff were very nice the hotel in general is great and new There is a bus station right in front of the hotel and is very near to the airport Ideally you take this hotel if you need to be in the airport in early or fast They have a shuttle from and to the airport which is very good and helpful Usually taxi charge you 20 euros when you go to hotels that are nearby the ariport they say it is a fixed price They also have a depo to put your luggage in case you need to check out but want to spend some time out before going to the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Lighting in bathroom was extremely poor There was a foam soap dispenser by the sink and in the shower but the bathroom had no shampoo conditioner or solid soap The room was very small but otherwise comfortable   The staff was very friendly and accommodating The first room I was in had no working air conditioning The staff said that the first two floors were still on heat only but they cheerfully moved me to a different room that had working AC

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I didn t enjoy my stay what so ever here We landed at the airport and they gave me a number to ring this number wasn t recognised We couldn t find a shuttle bus to the hotel no one knew which shuttle bus we needed to look out for and nothing was stated on the website Also this States it is a hotel airport when clearly it isn t as its 15 20 mins away we had breakfast included which didn t state Continental breakfast the breakfast was awful and cold and the waitress wasn t very happy we ordered the shuttle bus and it only goes every 45 minutes we was the only ones on the shuttle bus who wanted the shuttle bus service The driver wouldnt leave till the actual time of departure baring in mind that our flight was in 2 hours so left us sitting around and he didn t even greet us Check out was very slow and and the driver took us to T1 before T2 which is where we needed to get our flight The swimming pool was freezing and very small It doesn t state the size of the pool on the hotel description

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Very comfortable bed nice room temperature Dinner available until 11pm very good for us arrived at 10pm Very nice breakfast with lots of variety Shuttle convenient back to airport next morning

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The staff could not have been more helpful excellent service all around Only slight moan is the amount of time we had to wait for the shuttle bus 45 min and 3 separate taxis refuse to take us as they clearly wanted a longer trip

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Restaurant and buffet were not the best to put it nicely Definitely eat the food at the bar We chose this hotel because of it s NON SMOKING rooms When I booked I even added a special note making sure these were NON SMOKING rooms We booked 4 rooms with this special request When we got there 3 of our rooms were great and 1 smelt horribly of smoke We addressed this with the front desk They sent someone up to smell and she told us it did not smell of smoke and it was a matter of opinion We asked several times to switch rooms or for a discounted rate as we would not be using the room and instead sleeping on the floor of one of our other rooms we had booked but they were extremely rude and not accommodating at all She continued to say it s a matter of opinion In fact she mentioned SHE smokes and so she would know how it smells LOL what a joke After several workers came to smell and a pretty heated argument they FINALLY switched us to another room My question is why didn t they switch at the first complaint We are all still baffled at that The customer is always right but to them their opinion and sense of smell was greater than ours Night crew was very condescending and rude   Beds and room were very comfortable SOME of the staff was amazing the cute girl from Italy and some of the other daytime crew were fantastic and very accommodating When we dropped off our bags early they were very thorough in checking our tickets to even grab a sweater out of the bag they watched me put in the room So your luggage is definitely safe in there The food at the bar was delicious

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: At this price level the hotel is good and nothing to complain about  Great staff attentive and welcoming Hotel is close enough to the airport but the free shuttle does take around half an hour so allow transfer time

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Far away from city bus stop is 10 meters from hotel but frequency is very less suggest you to walk 500 meters to reach marcabarna metro stop   Very near to airport airport shuttle available from morning 5 to night 12

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I chose this hotel for their pool and sauna These were not in good shape so I didn t use them after all It was a little disappointing  I didn t speak any Spanish or Catalan and they did their best to help me find transportation to a small town 2 hours away which consisted of a taxi and two buses It was my first time traveling outside of the USA so I wouldn t have been able to get to my destination the next day without their help

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The flooring of the room we stayed in seriously needs replacement There were some parts that are torn and gave a rather unsightly appearance The safe box can also use an update to allow the guest to set his her own code I had to get a key from the reception desk One of the two cups provided had a very noticeable hairline crack I took it down to the front desk and exchanged for another one   The staff was very helpful from the front desk to the restaurant to the shuttle bus driver

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I thought that the menu should be changed up a little however I know that can be quite hard Other than that everything was great   Everything I was provided with was excellent

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the shower the shower cabin is broken the water goes all over the floor in the bathroom even causing floor damage in the parket right out the bathroom door   Staff was extremely helpful the breakfast was excellent

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The buffet breakfast was limited in their offering I d like to see more variety of pastries and juices   Complimentary shuttle pick up and drop off was very good and always on schedule The front desk staff are friendly and really helpful and the room was clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: There isn t much not to like This time we tried out the new suites Large room very modern Very comfortable bed but as the rooms are new there were a few things we didn t like The open plan toilet was one of them and the lack of a blind at the window above the bath another Steet lighting makes the room too light at night Apart from that the room was very good   Bar snacks and wine on arrival bar is cosy Staff are very friendly and helpful Good shuttle to and from airport Good breakfast with plenty of choice

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: There s renovation work going on electric wires exposed unfinnished paint on walls holes and hosts are still given rooms on those floors Which is just scandalous and not at all worthy of a 4 star hotel If the establishement wants to renovate a floor it needs to be closed to public Absolutly unacceptable There s also MOLD on the wall Again scandalous Windows are really tatty and squeak The quality and quantity of towels in the bathroom are unsatisfying I think face towels and feet towels should at least be separated The general style and d co of the rooms is frankly worthy of a 3 stars hotel at most the d cor needs to be updated The floor is irregular and has places where there s sunken parts and irregular parquet The covers on the bed were good but the covers in the cupboard I was just shocked when i saw that Very old an very ugly I understand there could budget problems but I would have prefered not having covers at all that having to see that   The bathrooms are impeccable immaculately clean and great sober style The staff is really agreeable and courteous And the free airoport shuttle is very practical for travelers who come by plane thumbs up for that impeccable service Also nice lobby although a bit small decorated with good taste I wish the rooms were that well decorated also

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: There are few options to get back from the city centre in an efficient way   The room is very clean and spacious There was a good connection to the city center by bus Airport shuttle was also very good

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Soundproofing of the room is terrible We hear people speaking walking and snoring like they were inside your room Then it s difficult to take a rest here   People working in this hotel are very great The location is perfect close to the airport and easy to travel between city center and hotel 30 minutes to the center Free shuttle for the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: A bit of time to get there if needing to use public transport from barcelona Little market in hotel is quite expensive nothing is priced   Comfy bed Good staff prompt free transport to airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Need instructions on how to make shower work   Bed very comfortable but I couldn t figure out how to do the shower Next time I would pay a bit more and have breakfast

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: very nice and helpful reception the room is nice and clean the shuttle bus to the airport is great the location is a little bit far away from the city center but there is bus station for Bus 21 right in front of the door so it is fine

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: very nice and helpful reception the room is nice and clean the shuttle bus to the airport is great the location is a little bit far away from the city center but there is bus station for Bus 21 right in front of the door so it is fine

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Charged 44euros for 2 dogs to share our room Could have booked them their own for that   Staff were very friendly and helpful Lovely bar and restaurant

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: But a bit out of the way to the central part of Barcelona an hour by metro to The Gothic Quarter There were very loud people next to us that came back in the middle of the night The walls are very thin   Comfortable and clean Close to the airport Very nice staff Always had water and apples for us at reception

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the spa area is not very nice it could use some decoration and the water was not too clean or rather had a lot of bleach which made it unattractive for me to have a swim the sauna is extremely tiny the breakfast bufe is not bad but the croissants were not really nice could be fresh and crunchy   the stuff was really nice and helpful the airport shuttle worked well and was on time the room was clean and spacious the food in the cafe was quite OK

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The pool was an absolute deception It looks nothing like the pictures and even more so like a pool that you ll find in your local leisure centre but smaller We didn t end up using it despite bringing along our bikinis and planning to do so This wasn t a massive dissapointment though   Room was clean and very modern as was the hotel in general Staff were nice except one lady though I ve spoken to the manager about her already The location is a little far out however there is a bus stop literally 15 seconds outside of the hotel which takes you right to the city centre in less than 20 minutes There is also a metro station only 5 minutes walk from the hotel too For this reason I think the location balances up seeing as the hotel price is very decent Hotel staff helped print out my boarding pass and have a shuttle bus which collects and drops you from to the airport Super bonus

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The water is not hot when taking a shower and we went to the counter twice to reply this problem The staff said because of the new year he could not fix the problem and all the rooms in hotel were full He couldn t change the room for us at the first time when we told him It s too cold to take a shower so the second time he gave us an empty room to take shower It s really awful that he lied that there was no solution at the beginning  Welcome drink the service of shuttle bus to the airport and the breakfast were nice

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Still quite a way from airport 35 Euro to get to airport which was 1 2 price of a hotel room for night   Nice Hotel with shuttle but not before 5am so forget about making your 6am flights

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The restaurant staff were not a happy bunch One young lady was smiling and very quick The others needed lessons in customer service a complete contrast to the reception staff Very disappointing as the meal was good but the attitude of the staff made you want to leave the restaurant   The reception staff were excellent and efficient and the room was clean and pleasant with a comfy bed which is a bonus Shuttle service went on time and that was a real plus for staying at this hotel The evening meal was good and hot

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Not accessible easily by metro Location on the website is misleading I made the mistake of thinking it was an easy stop to get off at the market since they mentioned it was next to the market The metro stops far away and its quick a walk to get out of the market Directions from downtown would be appreciated Metro Bus connection etc   The room and amenities were excellent The staff in the morning were excellent and very helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel is near the airport but in an industrial area Nothing of interest in the vicinity so one just goes there to sleep Breakfast buffet was pretty good but service terrible One lone staffer couldn t keep up with attending to the dining area although not that many of us there at that time He spent more time in the kitchen than in the dining room so maybe they were short staffed there also   All amenities needed by a traveler Staff generally very helpful I needed to go to the airport way earlier than their shuttle service operated but they happily organized a taxi for me and offered to make me a boxed breakfast to go There is a bus stop right outside the hotel making it very easy to get into the city and back

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The gym was out of order being repaired and the pool was much smaller than I expected it was also cold   The veal burger was delicious and well priced The staff were very friendly and helpful and the shower was amazing

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I actually consider it as a 3 star hotel I think they need to refurbish modernize a bit since it s 4 star   It s a 15 mins drive from the airport Free airport shuttle Late night snacks available at their mini shop in the lobby

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The breakfast buffet not kept hot enough But staff would cook fresh on request   Bus stop outside to get into Barcelona centre Comfortable bed Spotless Food good and reasonable Friendly and helpful staff Airport shuttle

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Communication of front desk person when we called regarding free shuttle pick up time   Room was nice and late snack at bar as well as breakfast were fine

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Charge for parking lot not expected   Convenient to airport Room safe for free use Good selection of food at breakfast and bar snacks too Staff very friendly

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Dinner at the restaurant started very late in the evening 2030 or so The area around the restaurant was industrial and didn t offer much for dining or food either something to consider if you are flying early in the morning and want a early dinner   The hotel has a airport shuttle that starts running at 5am which was great for us because we had a early flight The hotel is very close to the airport probably a 10 minute drive We walked about 1 5 kilometers to the nearest subway to go downtown to Barcelona i can t remember the name but it was a industrial area that use to be the Olympic village in 92 For food we ate the bar they had an excellent menu and much cheaper than the restaurant

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Indoor pool was tiny approx 3 x 5 meters We asked for extra sashes of coffee for the room which we got but we were told the room allocation is one per guest per day if we wanted more we would be charged for them So we got the coffee but didn t dare ask for the milk cream to go with it Tip bring your own   Staff at reception were very friendly and helpful Hotel and rooms were clean 10 15 mins away from the airport Airport shuttle available but wait for it near the bottom of the road C area

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The night staff that checked us in didn t make us feel welcome no welcome drink was offered to us on arrival We thought one of the staff members nose piercing was highly unprofessional I talked to the staff in Spanish and the would answer me in English   The beds are really comfortable it s a nice and easy going hotel We had a lovely Spanish gentlemen checking us out of the hotel in the morning very pleasant and polite The free shuttle bus was brilliant on time quick and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Had some issues getting fresh milk Little shop was too expensive Rather than try to make every euro possible it would be great to see a service model meeting the needs of the client came first   Interesting location at a good price Once you got to know the subway it was great

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Awful location only option to get there and feel safe at night is by taxi Rooms are loud can hear all big industrial vehicles going past bed rolled around the room like a toy pram Not cheap   Nice varied facilities Unfortunately you have to pay for things like use of baggage scale Staff were great about leaving boxes in advance Free shuttle is primary reason for staying

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Where to start First room I was assigned had a horrid sewage smell that hit me as soon as I opened the door Changed rooms to one on the 4th floor advertised as having AC but apparently it is turned off starting November Even tho it is still hot outside Room was very warm so asked to move to lower hopefully cooler floor Got one on the 2nd floor which seemed great Until 6 am when the noxious smell of cigarette smoke started blowing into my room from who know s where This is supposed to be a 100 non smoking hotel but as seems to be typical in Europe that little detail seems to be willfully ignored It was awful Needless to say my one night there could have been better The front desk personnel were very helpful and accommodating and none of the issues were their fault   The bed was actually comfortable better than expected Breakfast was a good value for the money Close to the airport was the reason I selected this hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No wash clothes in bathrooms are Americans the only ones who use them Facility is obviously old and being updated No grab bars in tub shower dangerous No tub gripper mat dangerous We d chosen it for its cruise passenger package which included a breakfast Never got breakfast because coffee wasn t available before 5 30 AM when we had to catch the shuttle to the airport No accommodation offered by staff to take away coffee and croissant No price break Temperature of room was 25 C when we arrived We asked for someone to come adjust it Took over 1 2 hour for someone to arrive No written instructions provided on site to guide guest in adjusting room temperature

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Directions to the pick up stop for the shuttle need to be more detailed Breakfast not included and very expensive It was a longer ride to the hotel than I expected Door G pick up spot for shuttle not clearly marked If you are dropping off a car be sure to get very clear directions to the pick up spot Its not at the baggage claim area   clean Clear that you needed to book the reservation for the shuttle to the airport It only holds 13 people and can be very tight

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
