Full_Review: What we did not like about our stay was the strobe like effect of a faulty light in the bathroom When we turned the light OFF it strobed every few seconds like a flashlight on automatic so we decided to sleep with the bathroom light ON instead not ideal because we like to sleep in the dark We told reception staff next morning to save future guests suffering the same problem The staff were unconcerned No apology no offer of part refund or anything They did not even ask WHICH of the four bathroom lights was the problem or ask for more details of its manifestation They just said they would report it to Maintenance

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The bathroom is not user friendly It is very attractive to look at but the tub shower is difficult to use and actually dangerous All surfaces are hard There are no hand holds to help you get in or out of the tub One slip you have a potential serious injury I would not stay there again because of this   Shuttle service to from Airport Dining room cafeteria good Desk staff excellent

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the breakfast is way overpriced for what is offered They are taking advantage that there are no close places to eat and many travelers do not have a car   front desk staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Nothing to complain about we would have liked the restaurant to have opened before 8pm   Every member of staff were excellent friendly and helpful The hotel was perfect for a stop over for one night between airport and port prior to a cruise

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the location is impossible very unpleasant in a desolated industrial area and quite far Even taxi drivers using GPS had hard time finding how to get there It is certainly not 5 minuted from the airport and if you try to get there with your own car you may get lost the hotel shuttle went 15 minutes in a very complicated way The rooms were OK but nothing to write home about Very bad sound proof we practically heard what other people say in the next room and the corridor let alone people coughing or children s crying The light is unpleasant bathroom is somehow sophisticated but not so nicely maintained water came simultaneously from the rainfall and telephone taps Food is OK but breakfast area is small and in the morning a bit crowded so that if you are in a hurry to leave you can t wait for refills And so are the tiny two lifts that can carry very little luggage people at once so that you end up waiting long to get the lift In total is is not worthy the more than 150 E including breakfast per night   nothing in particular the staff were nice shuttle was OK

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: hotel is in the middle of an industrial park so you are stuck there for meals unless you go to barcelona staff is very slow often waited 10 mins to be acknowledged at the restaurant or cafeteria sign on AC tells you not to touch it ridiculous as room was consistently very warm and leaving windows open was way too noisy   see previous reviews this last one was written after third stay here during same trip good food staff accommodating allowing us to store bike boxes for free for two weeks easy access to barcelona by bus and could have used the metro instead if wanted to walk to the stop 20 mins away

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: hotel is in the middle of nowhere so if you don t want to eat there you have to have a car or go to barcelona understaffed or motivated staff took a long time to do anything   free shuttle to airport easy access to barcelona bus food available most of the day and night

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We asked for a double bed We got two 1 1 2 size beds adjacent to each other a little dangerous for manoeuvres Don t try them Live for another day   A hotel of international standards in all respects Best for the business traveller or those with a car Bus 21 is convenient to the metro nearest station Paral lel A convenient time or departure of bus 21 is 09 40 in the morning Fare 2 40 euro The driver gave change from a 20 euro note to our relief Long ride to town a little hairy in the way back at night make sure you tell the driver that you want to get off at hotel Alpha Be vigilant for his her signal to avoid surprises No other problems Take a swimming suit with ya hotel has a small pool and sauna Gym facilities as well

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Was a little noisy being right next to very busy road   It was close to the airport our flight was delayed and we needed hotel for one night Pleasant surprise hotel was very clean staff very friendly but and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel is not close to the airport   There was a free shuttle from the hotel to the airport that was booked in advance Otherwise a taxi had to be used with the cost over 30 euros

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Far from activities restaurants and things to see Industrial area not suited for leisure travelers  Decent breakfast spread close to bus stop free airport shuttle

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Free airport transfer too an hour for a hotel advertised as an airport hotel this is poor Hotel was ok looking tired but clean and friendly staff Expensive for an off site airport hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: On a very busy main road and motorway toll station so significant traffic noise all night  Whilst listed as airport hotel was a 15min bus ride away However the courtesy bus service was excellent

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Can t think of anything   Fantastic in all respects breakfast too even early in the morning Staff helpful Would book again Room fine all we needed Excellent value for money Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: room windows faced entrance to the hotel and we were woken up by noise very late in the night AC was noisy so left windows open wished shuttle came more frequently than every 45 minites   staff was very accommodating of our needs they are allowing us to store our bags for two weeks no charge they got me ice for my sore wrist they allowed us to assemble our bike in a great place near their pool they provided a free airport shuttle and this time i had no trouble catching it see my previous review where i missed a shuttle stop

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No attention to details need associates to make a follow up   Requested tea coffee facilities never happen 3 times we have to go down on the restaurant to ask for hot water phone not working

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Had trouble getting to the hotel from the airport Should have made contact with the hotel on booking to find out but booked at short notice  Really comfy bed Concierge spoke English Small charge for breakfast Tea and coffee available in the room

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I booked online for a double bed but was given two separate beds next to eachother The pool was much much smaller than pictured and it was also not with the glass roof over the pool as pictured The breakfast was not included and for 100 a night i thought it would have been   The room and restaurant were clean The staff were all very polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The shock on Monday mornings when the trucks started rolling past so recommend weekend stays   Perfectly situated for airport and getting to the city sights

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Really far from the city centre Very small swimming pool sauna fitness area just one machine really High prices in the hotel s mini mart   Nice bed Clean room Not far from the Metro Close ish to the airport Nice and very welcoming staff Easy check in check out process

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Room decor slightly outdated the bathroom being the exception modern and updated   Good location near the airport Rooms are decent clean Staff is very friendly Free airport shuttle is a huge plus

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: It s a little remote with no shop or other buildings adjacent to it   Bus stop to the city is almost directly in front of the hotel It only cost 2 15 to go to Batcelona city centre and the journey takes only about 20 minutes

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The chef came personally to introduce him the food was off excellent quality the room was clean wifi top notch the staff always helpful and friendly The facilities was taken good care pool yard benches chairs and tables clean Will recommend this hotel to anyone as it was a pleasure staying there The language was not even a barrier they made us feel totally welcome

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: definitely not a 4star I would rate it as 2star for spain the location is horrible it is an industrial area surrounded only with trucks and factories the subway is quite far the bus takes you only close to the centre taxi costed 20 euros till the centre of barcelona the swimming pool and sauna was horrible could not even rate as 1 star not heated this hotel is good only for one night sleep and fly if you want to enjoy pool or see something in barcelona at list go out for dinner I do not recommend does not worse to save on shuttle  staff was really friendly and the shuttle service was good

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Cant think of anything to improve this hotel maybe more English speaking tv stations  The room was large and comfortable the bathroom facilities were spot on we did not use the pool but it looked just right the restaurant was very good great breakfast

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The area It was on an industrial site However ideally placed between the airport and the port for the cruises Was about 15 minutes in taxi from centre of Barcelona and night life   Clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Reception staff told us the pool was open til 11pm we came back especially but it was closed at 9pm wrong times for everything given consistently so not sure of the receptionists ability or knowledge We got a decent deal but the general price is way overpriced for what you receive   Close to airport good shuttle bus comfy bed nice shower

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The toiletries there was no small bottles of shower gel or shampoo The swimming pool was a let down as well   The staff were very helpful The airport shuttle bus was great as well very punctual

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Front desk arranged taxi to port for us but according to driver price was not what we were told   Manager was helpful when room could not accommodate 4 people Gave us another room at a good price and included breakfast Problem caused by booking company Bus stop in front of hotel took you right to transportation hub

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: breakfast is open until 11 unless the food is already all gone which they don t seem to refill and the breakfast lady is pretty grouchy   almost All the staff were great and the location is reasonably close to the airport so convenient and the free shuttle is super handy rooms are nice clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The free transfer from the airport was good but we waited for over 2 hours The directions of where the minibus picked up were not very clear If this was improved it would greatly improve our experience

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The pool could have been a bit bigger and its location a bit more convenient  Good location for proximity to airport Shuttle bus efficient and on time

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The food in the bar attached to the restaurant was terrible and not really representative of previous reviews The food was almost inedible we refused to pay it was that bad Also its further away from the airport than is indicated more like 20 25 minutes on the shuttle painful early in the morning   Clean quiet bedroom

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Freezing pool blow dryer didnt work breakfast expensive beds very hard shower didnt work Ok value not great Concerned about best western in Europe   Cleanliness airport shuttle service

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Difficult to reach by public transport from city centre especially on a Sunday Cafe area not very warm inviting   Comfortable bed Spacious bathroom Clean modern appearance

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the staff in the dining room were not friendly this hotel is in the middle of an industrial area there is nothing around the hotel such as shopping and restaurants  rooms were nice and comfortable the hotel is very clean

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Sauna and pool was poor Sauna had broken boards and was very small Hotel location wasn t the greatest middle of warehouse district and no open convenience stores Room was small   Easy connection to downtown Barcelona with bus Quiet and clean room Good variety of breakfast buffet

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: A bit disappointed that they had no facilities for children Something like a football table would have been great for kids Also the fact that there were no tea or coffee in the room If they don t have free coffee and tea in the rooms then I thought customers should have warm drinks on their first night and maybe last nights free Here we had no warm drinks free I had to pay for warm drinks the night we arrived Otherwise I think its a lovely hotel   Very clean At first I did not like it because i am used to seeing hotels with much wider reception However the staff are helpful and for me its the overall cleanliness of the hotel Very impressive My kids really liked the hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: It s a good Hotel in my eyes for Business when you Need to be Close by For the rest there might better Options Everything is ok but just nothing Special

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The staff were so incredibly busy always Very helpful and nice but they would be handling 3 4 customers at the same time making it impossible for them to focus on one enquiry That was a pity as it meant in the end everyone had to wait   Very comfortable hotel for business traveling good breakfast great bed bathroom

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Taxi couldn t find it it s in the middle of an industrial area about a mile from any restaurant or shop The hotel restaurant was awful possibly the worst I ve been to in Spain The purpose of heating Creme Brulee is to caramelise the sugar not incinerate the entire dish Huge queues at reservation just chaotic   Wifi is good

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Would have liked the restaurant to open a little earlier as we were tired from travelling and wanted to have something to eat before going to bed The children with us were falling asleep before they had some food   The staff were very friendly and helpful The hotel was as it was described and we liked the airport shuttle

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: It is slightly overpriced I would have been happier with it being between 60 80   Great breakfast very friendly staff Also good to have the free airport shuttle at your disposal

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Is this really a 4 star Didn t reach my expectations of 4 star accommodation Pool wasn t particularly inspiring   Friendly staff good location useful bus service to El Prat

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: That the restaurant didn t open for dinner until 830pm  bus stop right outside the hotel was very convenient and the staff was friendly and helpful I also loved breakfast buffet at 5am

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the pool was so small that we ended up not bothering to go at all   Loved the family ajoining rooms that we had modern decor comfy beds clean etc

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The third folding bed in the triple room was damaged and worn This bed received the full force of the air conditioning while the rest of the room remained warm The analog thermostat for the A C was difficult to control The breakfast coffee was weak and tasteless The bathroom sink was dirty mostly because of its fancy design   Complementary transport to and from airport including free taxi when the hotel bus was free There s a small shop in the lobby for basic necessities and souvenirs

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Waited a long time to check in and also to check out Our room was not what the picture showed They did not wipe the desk down it was sticky   The dining room was nice

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Very difficult to find shuttle bus no signs at all no information available Staff not very interested or welcoming Food expensive only sandwiches available until 8 30pm I realise eating times are according to Spanish custom but this is an airport hotel for international travellers Overall I thought the hotel was far too expensive for what was on offer   Shuttle bus was useful once it could be found Room clean soundproof

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: One of the lifts wasn t working very well would have been good if there were tea coffee making facilities in the rooms   Helpful staff well organised

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We walked to the Hotel and there were virtually no sign of the premises until we walked in the door Street signs would be a good idea When we were dropped at the airport we were actually asked to get out of the bus quite some distance from the entrance Quite confusing as all communication was in Spanish even though at least half the bus was filled with English speakers I also felt it was fairly expensive for what we got compared to all the other accommodation we had used in Spain   We booked this place to take advantage of the shuttle to the airport It was clean and comfortable for the very short time we spent there

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We were going to have lunch there but no one as at the cafe counter The pool was bit cold The sauna didn t seem to work   The mini market where you could buy snacks was great They got us into a room early as we came from a cruise Front desk folks were fantastic There is a bus stop that takes you downtown across the street

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Restaurant food was fair Had difficulty getting transport from airport Waited over an hour finally took taxi 20 Hotel did reimburse us for the expense   Standard room close to airport free airport transport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We were particularly pleased with the dinner we enjoyed in the restaurant on site The staff were all friendly and helpful and the location allowed us to take the shuttle for our 10 10 a m flight

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: broken lift and no assistance with bags sauna out of order no change room for swimming pool tiny gym facilities not everything offered at the breakfast was good hotel is far from aeroport paid over 20 eur for taxi at night  bus to the city center reinnovated and reasonable sized room

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The breakfast was not included in the price   Positive Points The Location near the airport and the Cruise Port The value for money The rooms were very comfortable The general manager s professionalism thank you for making our trip so good The wifi Internet is super fast throughout the hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Suttle from airport was hard to find the hotel needs painting and upgrading the hallways look shabby its not a four star hotel  Comfortable bed quiet surroundings good breakfast

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: This hotel is perfect for early morning flight but it is a bit in the middle of nowhere if you are looking to stay over for recreational reason the free shuttle bus will bring you at the airport in 15 20 minutes first bus is at 5am 30min frequency The restaurant is good and has fair prices

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: As mentioned in previous reviews there is nothing around the hotel except industrial trans shipment facilities Eat at the hotel or at the airport before you take the shuttle Do not attempt the metro it s expensive and drops you in the middle of no where It turns out it s probably only a 600 800m walk to the hotel if you know the way but two calls to the hotel didn t help us figure it out and we walked about twice that far over cobblestones pulling bags in sweltering heat   The convenience to the airport and the shuttle were the best features The room was good the staff quite responsive and their willingness to store luggage between stays extremely helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Buffet Breakfast is optional surcharge weak wifi Problems with Lights Lights goes off mostly No international prepared foods from the restaurant   Buffet Breakfast are good balanced diets Though not included in the booking is an optional surcharge Staffs Rooms and Airport Shuttle services is free

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Instructions for airport pickup I had to call to find out I needed to walk to Parking G This should be in the instructions and also you could give arrival time Also while convenient to Metro you are located a ways from city center and you need to walk along an industrial area It is very well lit   Fantastic breakfast buffet Airport pickup convenient 7 minute walk to the metro Staff was very helpful with instructions and restaurant suggestions Ana made us a reservation the first night at a wonderful restaurant near Barcelonetta Peggy was very helpful with places to see Our room for 3 was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The location of the hotel within an industrial park limited options for dining and or any leisure activities   Location was convenient for easy access to airport so it worked well for our travel needs Staff was very friendly and helpful Arrangements for free shuttle to airport was provided with no issues Hotel restaurant was good

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: For going to the airport using your own car is problematic because of road restrains and poor traffic signs   One of the best restaurants in the airport hotel category near the airport Choice in the evening is good and the wine prices reasonable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Location not great if you want the city centre it s not the most scenic part of town but is very convenient for the airport   Staff were excellent couldn t do enough to help us we booked in last minute after our flight home was cancelled and we needed an extra night s accommodation in Barcelona

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The bar bill and breakfast totted up to the same price as the room which made this an expensive choice We had 1 wine and 1 spirit   Good location for the airport with regular shuttles to and fro There is nothing to do around the hotel which is located in an industrial area but we did find a walk along the estuary eventually There is no residential area

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The buffet breakfast was awful There was a fly in the dessert tray The hotel is set in dismill surroundings Very generic room  The only positive is that is is close to airport and they provide free shuttle service to the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: restaurant is quite expensive  Close to Barcelona s airport close to bus and metro stration small market inside the hotel restaurant friendly staff awesome breakfast

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I asked for a room away from the lift ie a quiet room but my room was over what I assume was the air con units so was noisey  The bed was very comfortable the shuttle bus was on time

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Plunger to stop water running out of sink kaput Uncomfortable mattress on hubbies side Only stayed two nights wasnt worth hassle to move rooms   Good breakfast and snacks in the cafeteria

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The pool was disappointing being enclosed in a small dark room   I chose this hotel because of the free airport shuttle since we were coming in one day and leaving the next Not only did that work well but we learned we could take the public bus from in front of the hotel to very close to Las Ramblas so our few hours in Barcelona were not spent sitting around the hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I called to the hotel as agreed when I landed at El Prat The time 23 32 I had to wait for the shuttle until 00 48 Room 410 The shower is awfull

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Didn t like the rude server in the restaurant  They were a little rude in the restaurant I can t eat anything with fish and stuff and they weren t very nice when I asked what didn t contain fish I m think it could of been a laugage barrier

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Isolated location if wanting to go anywhere but airport but there is bus and metro transportation nearby   Knowledgeable friendly staff Close to airport excellent shuttle service Good food at restaurant bar Room is large and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Some misunderstanding about breakfast inclusion Ad should state continental breakfast rather than breakfast for clarity Americans are more used to full breakfasts if not otherwise described   Helpful staff Stayed for 2 nights following a cruise convenient to airport some distance from the city A compromise

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: IF YOUR RESERVATION STATES FREE BREAKFAST CHECK THE FINE PRINT THE PERSON IN THE BREAKFAST AREA TOLD OUR PARTY AT LEAST 5 TIMES 1 CUP OF COFFEE 1 CROISSANT 1 JUICE REMINDED US OF THE SOUP NAZI IN SEINFELD   SHUTTLE TO AIRPORT YOUNG PEOPLE AT FRONT DESK VERY HELPFUL

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Not that close to the airport It s not fun to get there by Metro if you carry a lot The gym isn t really a GYM   Great fresh and varied breakfast Small heated pool and sauna

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Only a small thing but airport pickup is a little confusing just walk STRAIGHT through the ground floor car park and the pickup point is right there opposite the last parking bay   Great location for airport layover Great service pickup and return to airport We had a good snack meal at night and the breakfast was great all you need and more Staff most helpful Good clean bedroom with nice bathroom

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We arrived at Barcelona around 11pm and thus booked this hotel hoping the airport shuttle bus can pick us up conveniently I called the hotel in the morning to query about the shuttle bus and the lady told me i just need to ring them once I landed Me my boyfriend and another guy tried to call them since 1130pm but the line was always BUSY Until 1230pm the shuttle bus finally came but for the past 1hour at middle night no one from hotel picked up the call and we were really depressed as we didn t know if the shuttle bus is gonna come   Room and breakfast was nice

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: It was farther from the airport than expected and the shuttle didn t start early enough for early morning flights No food service until after 8 30 p m   Clean comfortable room good value for the price charged

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Seems an odd location for a hotel Our cab driver had a hard time finding it   We chose this hotel for the convenience of an airport shuttle One bonus was the nice shower

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: There is a charge for the car park which is a shame   Very close to the airport shuttle transfer was excellent and got us there in plenty of time for the flight We got a bus back from the centre which was nice and easy The receptionist was lovely and explained which buses to take

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Window was open when I arrived I could not shut it Very noisy It was very late and I was too tired to call reception So not entirely the hotels fault   The reception is always very welcoming The hotel is comfortable Good service to and from the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel is far from the city centre In general it is convenient to stay there only for one night if you are arriving late to the airport or having an early flight   The bathroom was very nicely designed Transfer to the airport is very convenient for people flying from El prat

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel is located in an industrial area so there s no place to walk However the restaurant cafe has good options and public transportation is convenient   The airport shuttle was really convenient Perfect place to stay the evening before our flight out Cheap options for beer and wine at the bar A cab ride from Playa Espania to the hotel was only 21E

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Over priced but I booked there because it was the only one I could find near airport that advertised a free shuttle It is in an industrial complex and so there were many businesssmen staying there and I felt like vulture meat   Loved the bed the room darkening curtains and the flatter pillows The staff were wonderful very well trained in customer service

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The staff were very friendly and helpful Nothing was too much effort thank you Arrived late and one night only but would use again for late or early flights

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I was disappointed to have to pay a taxi driver 27euro to get there from airport when a free shuttle bus was available I wanted to contact the hotel via email before my trip to find location of bus but no email address could be found Calling the hotel and looking for directions on arrival I feel is unfair to the paying consumer when you take into account extra charges on calls 5 euro credit in my phone went while talking to the receptionist who couldn t direct me to the bus   Staff were superb Quiet clean safe environment only 10 mins to airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The cot provided for our son was not a very comfortable bed   The staff were super helpful check in and check out were fast and easy and it was very clean

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Had to wait over an hour for the shuttle bus to arrive and when it did the driver was so rude If I was the manager of the hotel I would give him the sack straight away he gives such a bad first impression of the hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The room was modern and spacious The staff was very friendly The shuttle to and from the airport is super convenient I am very satisfied and recommend it to everyone that needs to stay close to the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Not the easiest commute to the city although a bus leaves from the bus stop that is at 5 minutes walking distance and the metro takes you relatively close 2km too took a taxi for the last part as it was late at night   Shuttle service friendly staff good prices for coffee at the bar convenient for a short stay close to the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: My stay at this hotel was fine However I would have expected a more luxurious property for the amount of money I was charged I felt overcharged   I enjoyed the courtesy airport shuttle

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Free ride to the airport at any time when you request it Very friendly staff willing to help you with whatever you need You can take the metro two blocks away and get to the centre of Madrid in about half an hour

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I waited an hour for the shuttle to come and collect me at the airport This after being told it would be only 30 minutes and having to call back the hotel multiple times I was offered a wake up call for the next morning by the receptionist when I checked in which I accepted They must have forgot as this was never received   Location to airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The location of this hotel was an absolute nightmare First of all the room was incredibly hot with no ability to adjust the thermostat as it is set by the hotel staff We had to open all of the windows in order to be able to get any cool air into the room This hotel is set in an industrial area with nothing around but warehouses and our room faced the main road and intersection where trucks were stopping and going literally throughout the entire night One after another we would hear the loud noises of truck brakes squealing at a red light idling and then the rumbling of them starting up again when the light turned green We re all pretty heavy sleepers and can handle noise but this kept us up for hours until we all put headphones on to dull out the sounds   The shuttle and proximity to the airport was the main reason for our stay There is a free shuttle that runs every 30 minutes to terminals 1 and 2

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Lost in the middle of and industrial zone not a problem if you only need one airport night   Free shuttle bus to the airport Walking distance to L9 metro line less than 10mn

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The rooms were like jail and the beds very uncomfortable Location is near a very busy highway therefore very noisy The hallways look as if they are under renovations and look very grimy   The hotel smells like an new born baby Very fresh and powdery Free airport shuttle is very convenient

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I have absolutely nothing bad to say about this hotel Everything was great for me   Very nice rooms clean big bathroom Comfortable Bed Absolutely value for money Good shuttle service to the airport Very nice and professional Staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the airport shuttle times for my arrival were not convenient   The restaurant serves great food till late the rooms are stylish comfortable staff friendly helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The included continental breakfast could have been better Juice coffee croissant was good but waiter watched that we did not take anything else and we could only have one not two as the croissants were small I did not know that we were only allowed 1 coffee and on one of the mornings when I went to get a second coffee was told by the waiter that I could not have a second coffee  That there was a bus outside the hotel to go to downtown Barcelona Liked the swimming pool Ate one of our dinners there It was very good but pricey Were some good and very reasonably priced restaurants just a short walk away

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the location might be good for attending exhibition to Fira otherwise public transport connection is not enough there is one one bus and frequency is every 30 min and to the nearest Metro station takes about 7 10 minutes to walk Breakfast should have a bit different I stayed there for 7 nights and every morning had the same breakfast some dry salami look dry and pretty old  staff are very nice and helpful that make you feel comfortable and welcome airport pick up is the advantage and follow the G which is for hotel parking very easy to find

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: A robe hook in the bathroom would be helpful   This is a very convenient place to stay near the airport in Barcelona with a free airport shuttle They also accept pets which is important for us travelling with our little dog The beds are comfortable the rooms are stylish

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Paying more for parking through the hotel than the ticket machine quotes It was a small sum but it is silly to charge more   The bathroom was fantastic and the bedroom very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Room service food was horrible Zucchini soup was sour and chicken and potatoes was greasy cafe standard Couldn t open the windows in room 222 because of outside smell   Staff were lovely and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Rooms cold beds uncomfortable Dining room menu very poor for an international hotel Very limited menu and only Spanish food available which tastes terrible and is over priced for the poor quantity Dangerous step from shower to bathroom floor in room and very poor badly worn towels Was quoted euro35 for a 5 minute journey back to airport Hotel has a courtesy bus which runs every 30 45 minutes We spent 45 minutes standing in the rain waiting for bus despite 4 phone calls to hotel This is a hotel to use ONLY if all others are full   The checkout procedure Staff were very keen to take money from you

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: As an asthmatic I found the smell of air freshener in the reception area overpowering So much so that I had to use my inhaler within a few minutes of entering the hotel   The staff were very helpful and accommodating especially in the restaurant

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Nothing  A perfect stop over we arrived the night before ready for a morning flight and it was ieal for this Had a very nice dinner which was reasonably priced The free shuttle service was a real bonus and was the main reason for staying but overall excellent value you for money and would highly recommend it

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: All round excellent value Nice hotel Good bar and bar food Staff were brilliant all spoke good English Very good facilities available for the price paid Room nice clean and simple with a smart bathroom Highly recommend

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The price for breakfast or anything from the restaurant or convenience shop was extortionate I had a rate booked for me that was meant to include breakfast but it turns out that in the fine print it said the rate was only available for cruise ship passengers Apparently the hotel values cruise ship passengers more than airport passengers because they not only told me that I would have to pay for breakfast fair enough I guess they did so in a loud manner that made it appear to all the people around that I was purposefully trying to mooch free breakfast off them Finally although the hotel markets itself as being an airport hotel it was a 20 Euro taxi ride from the airport after waiting unsuccessfully for the hotel shuttle to pick us up for more than an hour   The hotel was modern and clean

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The place is in the middle of nowhere If you are hungry be ready to spend more than hotel price is I had very bad experience about it and it is the first time I am writing any survey Restaurant opens just at 8 30 pm I ve arrived at 2pm Till that time there is caffee where you can eat smth I have ordered pizza price 10 eur Pizza was very very very small and too over cooked So I didn t eat it Of course they didn t take money As soon as restaurant opened I went there But food was very very very bad And despite this I ate it I was starving And after I ate everything all night I spent in the toilet while voming I told them but they said that I am just complaining That was the very first time for me with such experience and believe me I am traveling more than 200 days per year The conclusion I will better spend my night at the airport while waiting my next flight next time

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The heating system was blocked to 23 degrees but it seemed that there were 13 degrees Damn cold I got a flu for that  parking near the hotel and restaurant not bed

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We arranged an early breakfast but it was not provided We paid twice as much for the same accommodation on our return Corridors and bedrooms needed a update  Friendly staff Breakfas Super comfy bed 20 mins from El Pratt airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: In the middle of an industrial estate with nothing around Very strong overpowering smell of air freshener everywhere   Ideal if its just to sleep before or after a flight Free shuttle to airport was great Large clean rooms and a little restaurant on site

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Couldn t find the shuttle When you arrive at Barcelona make sure you call them to let them know you ve arrived   Was looking for somewhere to stay near the airport but there didn t seem to be much choice I booked the best western as they had a free shuttle and it was great

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The large spray of the shower was ineffective and the smaller nozzle sprayed water everywhere The bar meals were unimaginative and restaurant meals very expensive for the choice but good A large selection for breakfast but the hot food was barely warm   Helpful reception staff and efficient bar staff A shuttle bus to and from the airport and a local bus service with stops nearby to take us into town I would stay again for the convenience and knowledge that there was a reasonably priced and clean hotel near the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Was expecting a bath but I only had a shower and there was no kettle or complimentary tea coffee in my room   The location was only a 15 minute bus journey from airport and the free shuttle bus was on time and efficient The room was very clean and the double bed extremely comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No restaurants or food options around thd hotel after 23 00 local so it is better to grab something to eat from the airport before you go to the hotel   great hotel if you are laying over in BCN airport and need s room to sleep

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We stayed for one night only cause we had to go to the airport early next morning Everything was great Guy at front desk was very pleasant He explained everything in details so no further questions were necessary

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The location is no where near any of the city sights The restaurant food selections weren t very appealing   The staff was very friendly and helpful The triple room was perfect for me and my two kids ages 5 and 8 The indoor pool was small but stayed open late Very convenient and easy shuttle ride to the airport The FREE wifi was excellent and fast

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The receptionist was super polite and made me feel right welcomed As a stay of only 8hours a friendly face and good bed was all I needed between flights during Christmas season

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The hotel website should indicate the location of the airport bus shuttle and scheduled timing instead of requiring the customer to call the property upon arrival at the airport to find out as indicated in the booking The hotel phone line could not be reached and we have to ask around to find the shuttle pick up location   The family suite for 4 pp is spacious with 2 bedrooms and a jacuzzi in the bathroom The free airport shuttle is a plus point

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The built in alarm clock which went off every half hour No directions on how to use it   Convenient for airport Mini bus from the airport Pleasant staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: A bit too far from the airport so you will need to take the shuttle bus I was lucky to catch it right after my arrival and it was all sorted for my departure However please stock up on water necessities before leaving the airport Dinner at the restaurant only starts at 20 30 and there is no supermarket nearby Also no tea coffee facilities in room and my double bed was composed of two singles put together which kept going apart However the staff are really accommodating and will help you find everything you are looking for   The staff are extremely polite and lovely I was carrying a lot of bags and they all helped me manage that from the shuttle driver to the receptionist Very big room comfortable pillows and good prices for both the restaurant and the minibar Really good for an overnight layover

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The location was void of anything vaguely interesting   The bar and the dining area had good food The free transportation to the airport was excellent

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Location is bad away from city center only 2 buses to reach there Single occupancy room is too small not comfortable for even one person very cold attitude by staff breakfast tables not cleared for long

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The restaurant was a bit costly but the food was ok and the portions were huge   The staff was very helpful and fluent in English both at the reception and restaurant The room was better than expected and the hotel was quiet enough for an airport hotel Shuttle transport to and from hotel to airport was complementary and worked well

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The staff were totally helpful I was travelling with a dog and an elderly father It s only 10 mins from the airport it has parking the beds were comfy the shower and bath fantastic and the food was good What s not to like

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: I am really shocked with poor management of hotel financial system I had a free cancellation booking but suprisingly 2 days after booking the money was withrawn from my card without any perior permission Upon check in the lady receptionist refused the payment and said the money has not been deposited in their account and it was only blocked I showed her the statement but she denied severla times I was really angry but could not do any thing Till midnight i was trying to tell them that is their fault finally at 1 am a new receptionist simply told me it was taken by mistake without any apollogy for this illigal action I will never recommend this hotel and would complain against them   Airport shuttle was goog

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Although the hotel is approx 6 km away from the barcelona city the connectivity is good You have a bus stop close to the hotel You can also get a cab which will take you to the city for 15 euros   The room was comfortable and clean The breakfast is ok for 9 euros

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The lighting was not very good Great for men but women who put on make up need better lighting in the bathroom   I liked the location airport shuttle a plus and everything was good Bus just a few meters away to take you downtown Barcelona Beds great

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: the hotel is relative close to the airport however the location is in a industrial area with no public transportation and taxis are expensive if you want to go to the city center

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: 10 breakfast a little too high cold fried eggs but Kellogg cereals and amazing cakes I usually pay that kind of price in UK for cooked breakfast  Staff room size bed comfort free transfers

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No cold water in the shower Traffic noise if you have a room on the street side   The staff was great The close proximity to the airport with FREE shuttle service Onsite restaurant was excellent and the breakfast buffet was very good

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The swimming pool Sauna were to small no cooked meals until after 8pm only light snacks A portacabin with workers in looking up at the windows  Its location was close to where I was working the staff were great throughout the week very polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Great proximity to the airport but need to be prepared for the commute to do things in the city or surrounding areas Great value and team were fantastic airport transfer arrangements could be made clearer when arriving Will return

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The lobby could need a bit refurbishment The restaurant opened at 20 30 which is probably normal in Spain but was too late for me   Regarding the price one of the best hotels I have ever been For comparable rooms I normally pay double price

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: it was first time i saw a hanging shower with hair on it fortunately they had a hand shower that i could use the gym is a indoor pool a bike and wheight machine not enough room for more also but calling it a gym   the breakfast is great I also had dinner in the hotel bar and it was a very nice omolete the location is perfect for airport accessibility 15min with hotel FREE bus shuttle

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No air conditioning after a certain date  I like being able to get the airport shuttle I liked I was close to L craft And you could take the bus into town

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Breakfast wasn t that good and certainly not worth the 9 99 charged   Excellent and extremely fast Wi Fi comfortable rooms and beds very modern bathroom

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No resterant or supermarket nearby If anything I want to buy I need to take the bus to downtown   Shuttle bus is very convenient and the service is very good No metro but the public bus is easy to take

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The room was very small and dated High humidity so in the morning the windows were completely wet on the inside Air circulation was not great   There was parking though it s an additional charge Staff was friendly and helpful and there was a restaurant

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No hot water for a shower Room was next to motorway and you could hear the traffic all night long Toilet handle broke when pushed Door wouldn t open with key Management was totally unsympathetic to concerns Never again   The staff was very friendly The food in the bar was good and priced fairly

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: FREE shuttle does not start until 5am so no good for any flights that leave before 7 or 8 Staff are happy to arrange taxi which is 30 euros for 3 6 km ride More than airport to town center rate   Staff were available and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Just bring dropped off at wrong terminal  Everything staff excellent v friendly v helpful taking luggage straight up to room v convenient for bus stop into Barcalona airport shuttle good but driver should know which airline uses which terminal we were taken to wrong terminal really enjoyed our stay at Hotel Alfa would stay there again and recommend to our friends

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Bus to and from airport is not that frequent 45 minutes wait when we arrived It would also have been helpful to have a bus even earlier than the first one of the day 05h00 to allow enough time for the earliest flights from the airport We had to take a 15 minute taxi ride which cost 26 Euros   Well appointed and spacious room Luxurious finishes big walk in shower Good air conditioning

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No bad experience I just don t understand why the hotel just doesn t list where the shuttle drops and picks up passengers Instead you have to call them after you land which can be expensive for a international traveler   Airport shuuttle

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Food wasn t so good and because it is in a remote area there are not many other choices   Nice bathroom comfortable room nice free shuttle to airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The restaurant did not open until 20 30 hr at night It is located in an industrial park area so limited access to the main city and restaurants   The hotel has free shuttle service to airport Front desk staff were excellent Breakfast buffet was good

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The service transport To long waiting for next transport terminal 1 to Hotel The another hotels shuttle pass more time   No time Just sleep and living early

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Took extra time to get cups glasses at breakfast must have been busy and or short staffed as tables needed to be cleared  Pool was nice hours and warm dinner service excellent

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The express breakfast was not at all what we expected to be offered with the room We did expect more choice than a croissant roll and coffee juice   How nice and pleasant the staff was and how helpful they were to our every need

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Booked a room for 4 Ended up with a suite with 2 bedrooms Awesome Price was great Staff was extremely nice and helpful Food was excellent Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Clean place location can be difficult to find without GPS would like to see a lower price that s competitive with other hotels but no complaints about the stay other than that

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Long wait for shuttle at airport then only hourly shuttle back   Large comfortable family room quiet Great breakfast Free shuttle to and from airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Leaking washbasin and no bidet Very noisy if you like to sleep with open windows   The helpful and friendly attitude of ALL the staff The great service and fast response to our queries and emails

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Nothing I didn t like Great for a business person traveling thru For vacationing in Barcelona its way too far from activities in the City   The location as far as being close to airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Staff was slow Shower head was broken I reserve a full size bed what I ended up getting is two full size bed combine together with a gap in the middle   Nothing

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Only that it was in an industrial erea no where to browse nearby  We found the staff so helpful service was excellent food also really good plenty of choices

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The shuttle from the airport comes far too infrequently At night one can stand in a deserted area alone for far too long or in the hot sun for nearly an hour while other shuttles come and go 3 to 4 times   Price of room

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Most of the staff do not speak english food very average and expensive confusing menu  Clean good location if you fly early morning reasonable value for money room only

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Only issue with this hotel is the location It is far away from the city centre and it is not a good place if your intention is to visit the city However it is a perfect hotel to spend a night near to the airport   Hotel is very nice clean and Staff is very friendly Breakfast is also good and we enjoyed the breakfast during our stay

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: We were worried when we first saw the facility come into view Besides being in an industrial area the exterior made us wonder if it was a dump What a great surprise as a young fellow held the door for us to enter a beautiful spot   The interior was very nicely decorated The food was exceptional and artistically arranged on the plate The staff was friendly and helpful Although the location was an industrial area it suited us perfectly because we just needed a nice place to sleep eat to rest up before going on our cruise

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: 1 Hotel staff said taxi would cost us about 20 EUR But actually taxi driver asked whole 33 EUR it is way too much Since we booked taxi through hotel reception staff we expected that it will be fair and trustworthy taxi company Very disappointed 2 We booked this not cheap hotel nearby the airport hoping to save some money on transfer to the airport with free shuttle service But it turned out that bus shuttle works only during the daytime This was a surprise We had a flight at 06 20 AM Cancel booking was not possible so we were actually locked to stay and we eventually had to order taxi anyway Then happened 1 read above 3 At the lobby bar staff is definitely not customer oriented We waited to place an order then we waited to pay the bill of 17 EUR for the tiniest pizza I ve ever seen in my life and 4 ordinary black teas   Polite staff clean facility

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The shower worked but had a slow drain and kind of a weird set up  Very friendly and accommodating staff great breakfast and a fantastic dinner Close to airport with a shuttle bus and served our purposes well which were to sleep and eat after a long flight

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The tub in the bathroom was way to slippery Concerned we would fall Walls in the hall way we re very dirty and scuffed   Nice clean room Liked the choice of pillows

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: nothing  friendly staff helpful receptionists Food was good in restaurant Good size bedrooms Shower was lovely large cubicle with toiletries supplied

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Bed was a bit too hard for me but my husband liked it Tea coffee facilities in room would be preferable to the free toiletries   Room was a suite rather than a room with sofa bed Fantastic circular bath Shuttle service efficient Staff helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Location unless you are willing to take a long bus ride busses are frequent swimming pool not heated sauna is not working at all If you are city visitor this hotel is not for you as this is located in a remote industrial area No tea coffee making in this hotel but not many hotels in Barcelona provide this so it is your choice   Room staff bathroom free shuttle service which is on time and helpful closer to airport very good for early flights AC

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The only negative thing was the location but it was easy to get a taxi if we needed to go anywhere   Helpful staff comfy and luxurious rooms quick wifi and great facilities Overall it was a really good experience staying at this Hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: This hotel has Aeropuerto in its name therefore mostly geared towards passengers arriving from a flight departing next morning or both Their airport shuttle should be the most important offering Instead if you book a stay at this hotel there is no guarantee you re getting a shuttle ride at all They run the shuttle from the hotel to the airport on a preset schedule with 45 minute intervals and there are only 8 seats per ride I would strongly suggest taking this into consideration before booking this hotel as this may screw up your plans very badly The hotel itself is in a middle of a industrial area not sure if you can get a taxi to pick you up from there Our reservation was breakfast included we came in and sat at a table The breakfast attendant asked us the room number which we thought was normal At the end without any explanation she handed us a bill for our breakfast which apparently we must pay now I pulled my smartphone showing our reservation on Booking com clearly stating that breakfast was included Instead she sent us to the receptionist to handle the bill situation At first the receptionist tried to convince me that breakfast was not included until I pulled my smartphone again then she clicked something on her computer and said it was ok and we did not have to pay for breakfast Breakfast area was not air conditioned hot and muggy the food choice was minimal and of poor quality Their only coffee machine was a hit or miss Had to complain it did not dispense hot water attendant came in and restarted the machine If you pressed Hot Chocolate you got Coffee If you re planning to use the indoor pool please remember that they require everyone to wear a swim cap   Very spacious two bedroom suite with the largest bathroom had a Jacuzzi shaped bathtub Very comfortable mattresses

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Breakfast was ok but many hotels including other Best Western providives free breakfast Not many choices in the buffet for vegetarians for the price No other restaurants close by   Clean and spacious rooms and washrooms very friendly and helpful and warm staff free airport shuttle service quite rooms Front office staff were very helpful in providing information on city tours etc Check in times were good

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Difficult to find when driving to the hotel on an industrial estate Soap dispenser in shower was empty   Efficient and helpful check in staff Good service in bar restaurant serving food until early hours to accommodate arrivals Wide selection available for breakfast Great to have a mini supermarket on site to buy supplies when arriving late at night

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: The taxi from the airport was 20 to the hotel We got a free transfer back however from the hotel  Excellent dinner in the restaurant the staff and food were great

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Parking is 10 Euros for the one night we parked our car and the staff didn t care to ask if we needed to park a car I had to ask about parking and cost   Safe location close to the airport even though we must have missed a turn and took the long way to the airport well kept hotel comfortable beds new feeling linens clean room Mini fridge in the hotel room Free wifi Super great is that across the street is a gasoline station for refueling your rental car before you return it at the airport

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: complementary in room coffee would have been nice or even guest coffee in the lobby without charge I didn t like getting the 5 30 a m wake up call I had asked for at 5 00 a m instead I feel the time between shuttle pickup at the airport 45 minutes is way too long especially if it is late at night after a long flight or if one has to stand in the sun waiting for this amount of time   Staff were great and helpful as well as friendly Nice room

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Very expensive room service fridge wasn t working  Comfortable bed clean room nice bathroom enjoyed the pool

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: No one to bring the luggage to the room and the cleanleness   The parking

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: Unfortunately asked for three full twins but got roll away so one of us slept on floor

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto
Full_Review: All you need for a quick stop over

Hotel_Name: Hotel Best Western PLUS Alfa Aeropuerto

Tv could have more international channels with English speaking programmes not just bbc news and CNN  This hotel has a perfect central location the staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful and the room was very clean and of superb quality with a really comfy bed

The air con didn t seem to work that great and some nights could get quite stuffy But as a whole was impressed and happy with the hotel   The hotel was at a good standard and for me what makes it is the location and how close you are to all of the sites The cathedral is on your doorstep and a lovely Vietnamese restaurant around the corner

The shower we had difficulty operating the shower and were unable to get any hot water however after informing reception this was rectified by the second day   The breakfast choices were good and the staff efficient

Building work ongoing so noisy at times and restaurant not available other than breakfast Bar was frequently unattended so getting snacks drinks sometimes took a little more effort than expected Facilities were OK but it s the location you re really paying for Free wifi is a plus but the signal was typically poor unless in the hotel lobby   Fantastic location right by the cathedral and in the heart of the Gothic quarter Friendly and helpful staff Nice clean room

Very rich breakfast the hotel was spotless a real pleasure great location and a highly intuitive staff always available to answer questions and supply information in a quiet manner totally went the extra mile thanks guys for the birthday wishes in the room

The staff seemed overwhelmed and it was hard to get their attention for help Also the hotel was under construction and the construction was very loud during the day Plus the hotel was overrun by college students young adults who seemed to be going to the beach You could hear loud music at night and the general vibe of the hotel was very loud and chaotic Also it is very close to the Barcelona Cathedral so there are crowds and a lot of noise in the area If you are looking for a relaxing quiet environment I don t think this is the hotel for you   The room was clean and relatively spacious and the right price so those are definite plusses

I normally book 5 hotels because of the service they provide I however booked this hotel based on the reviews it had received on booking com which were super positive I must say I do not think paying 300 per night breakfast for a room at this hotel is money worth while So the reviews did not live up to my expectations You pay for the location everything else is just ok Breakfast was really average It was also very time consuming to organize a taxi pick up at the airport The hotel never reverted to my initial request and I had to reach out again to them and the email I got was in bad English and very unclear as to how transportation is arranged I had to call them to sort it out The hotel collaborates with VIP taxi company which is very slow in responding and clearly has no urgency to respond to client requests I ended up spending too much time on something that normally gets dealt with in an emsil I am used to better service and will next time choose a hotel that provides that   Great location The best part of the hotel

Taxi drivers getting lost trying to find the hotel Soulless reception and exterior Unfriendly unhelpful staff it appeared understaffed Collecting and returning towel for rooftop pool to reception Would seem much more logical to have them available at the pool The towels looked a bit past their best too   Location Rooftop pool
lower price  i like the location because its near the cathedral and the room was clean and the staff were very helpful i had a nice stay in this hotel and i would recommend it to my friends

Booked a double room only one breakfast was included argued about thus but had to pay fir second breakfast then had to leave mist if it because we had to get the taxi to the airport   Would have preferred a buffet breakfast instead of having to order it we were in a hurry to get to the airport to catch a plane
They had a happy half hour but seemed a bit tight and not really relaxing Better to not have it or extend it to an hour to tempt people to stay  Pleasant good size room

The fact that there are on going heavy works at the ground floor restaurant during peak season couped with the fact that we were not informed in advance was a let down The above is a sign that the hotel shareholders should perhaps look into the operation management and marketing dept and check their motivation levels Both depts show lack of interest and enthusiasm as in my opinion they should have 1 planned and executed these works during winter time 2 offer a discount to their guests or a free dinner at a restaurant or some additional perks as a compensation On the other hand the reception desk seem to be working struggling on their own without any help from management In our 4 days there I never once saw any manager walking the job there   The fact that the reception staff did their best to ease us and were very sympathetic to our discovery of on going heavy works made our shock a it better It was obvious that it was NOT their fault To their credit they put us in rooms where we could not hear a single thump or any hammering so we soon forgot about our initial horror Once we were sorted everything run smoothly and we had a great and unforgettable time Generally all the reception staff were super cool and very customer oriented The management of the hotel should give them a bonus Especially the guy who had his aunt visiting and who warned us about the flight cancellations to Madrid He should be promoted
Comfortable room Friendly and very helpful staff Excellent breakfasts Wonderful swimming pool on the roof Excellent to relax in after the hot hustle and bustle in the city

Service of snacks in the lobby could be better had to go on the hunt for staff However they were very prompt with pool orders and were good in the bar Other than that no issues at all   Staff were very friendly and helpful Modern and very clean Lots of room for travel cot which they provided with surprise Teddy Bear gift for baby and buggy Shower Excellent WiFi the best I ve experienced in a hotel very fast Location couldn t be better Air Con was good Large flatscreen TV Pool on roof was small but did the job not too busy

The air conditioner didn t seem to be cooling properly in the room   Great location for sightseeing shopping and restaurants Super nice front desk staff Complimentary happy hour Good size rooms toiletries
Lovely complimentary wine and cheese tasting of an evening Good shower and modern bathroom Nice little roof top pool not large but perfect for a splash

What we absolutely didn t appreciate and felt as a complete lack of professionalism and respect being promised a taxi within 5 10 that never showed up never even being told that taxis couldn t at that particular time reach the hotel which resulted in having to run almost 1 km chase a taxi with luggages and one of us being unfit to do so because of back problems WHAT WE TOUGHT THE HOTEL SHOULD JUST DROP a proposal for wine and cheese tasting that results in almost only one sip of a not so dry white wine and barely a cm of cheese per person   The location mostly and breakfast were quiet good we were happily surprised by this because of the winetasting s unexisting quality the day before I would have said personnel too if it weren t for the unpleasant ending of our stay

We had really good breakfasts with very friendly staff The pool on the roof was a real bonus a great spot to unwind after a busy day sightseeing The location of the hotel was very convenient for seeing the sights of Barcelona One more bonus was the fantastic mosaic The Kiss virtually outside the font door you must see this if you visit Barcelona

Lacked places to store clothing and other travel items No drawers which may be good as things cannot be left behind Well designed but nowhere to set a second suitcase Limited hangers Shower was great but needed easy instructions to operate Asked for a bathmat as tub was slick as in new Once acquainted with European electricity savers liked the use of room card to turn on and off all electricity A little tricky at first   Best location to sites Sunday 10am free tour of historic Barcelona was the best tour ever He told where we would be going announced the historic dates so nothing was confusing The tour moved without rushing and stopping was in shade Wish could have this guide for all tours

The room was very hot when we arrived and took a few hours to get down to temperature The shower didn t have a shelf to put your toiletries on There was a taxi strike starting at 06 00 which meant that we had to leave at 05 30 to get to the train station when our train left at 09 30 not the hotels fault and they did put up notices in the lifts to say that the strike was happening   Great location for exploring the Gothic district lots of winding lanes to go down The room was very comfortable loved the swing round television The staff were very friendly and helpful and spoke perfect English Will stay there again when we go back to Barcelona

The hotel doesn t have much food options inside  Fabulous location right across the cathedral plenty of action the minute you step out of the hotel Within easy reach of most spots la ramblas cathedral the beach and many more

We received a random charge after check out for 4 euros No explanation None of us used anything out of their bowl of snacks We had 3 rooms to accommodate all of us so our bill was large to begin with so I feel the 4 Euros was a bit ridiculous Its not like I would make an international call for 4 euros so   It is in a nice location Walkable to many sights close to a taxi stand The Barcelona Cathedral is right there The rooms were clean and a pretty good size The AC worked well We never had the breakfast because there is an excellent coffee shop next door highly recommended We would stay again

service from some staff members could have been better it felt like you were being troublesome if you asked for anything Info at the hotel said the bar stayed open till 12pm on Saturday but it closed at 11pm but nobody came to tell us and we were sitting in the bar   brilliant location right in the center for metro tourist buses shops restaurants etc We were at the side of the cathedral square and there was something happening there all the time musicians street performers markets
Ni A  Locations is fabulous right in the Gotbic Quarter and only a few blocks from La Rambla and Placa de La Catalunya The offer free walking tours and a early be and cheese tasting very evening
Nothing comes to mind   Quiet neighbourhood despite central location Spacious comfortable room with large luxurious bathroom Great breakfasts Also very helpful staff especially at reception desk
The breakfast is too expensive The door to our room didnt shut properly You had to force it   The location is perfect The bed is very comfortable and staff are friendly

A very small niggle we only had one drawer in the bedroom my friend lived out of her suitcase this did not detract from the holiday or the hotel   We thoroughly enjoyed our stay at the Barcelona Catedral the staff were lovely and friendly they were so helpful to 2 older ladies We had a wonderful 5 days in Barcelona

Would have appreciated an iron and ironing board in the room and also some body lotion with the complimentary toiletries   Exceptionally comfortable beds modern decor Room nice and clean The breakfast selection was very good although I personally preferred the bacon and sausages to be cooked more

The hotel printed out my card details EVERYTHING Even my CVV number Then they put it in an unlocked drawer with other people s card info When I questioned them I was met with ridicule since they have been doing this for a long time Well just bc you have been doing this for a long time it does not mean that it is the right way to do it They violated privacy policies On the last day we asked them to destroy the paper that had my card details Someone could buy sg really nice on the internet with all those card info Btw I ve notified my bank too   Great location Clean room Comfortable design not too stuffed with ridiculous items

The hotel printed out my card details EVERYTHING Even my CVV number Then they put it in an unlocked drawer with other people s card info When I questioned them I was met with ridicule since they have been doing this for a long time Well just bc you have been doing this for a long time it does not mean that it is the right way to do it They violated privacy policies On the last day we asked them to destroy the paper that had my card details Someone could buy sg really nice on the internet with all those card info Btw I ve notified my bank too   Great location Clean room Comfortable design not too stuffed with ridiculous items
